description: Five-language factual arithmetic prompts with language-specific full-sentence answers.

de.name: German
de.prompt: Berechne {left} plus {right}. Antworte mit einem vollstaendigen deutschen Satz.

en.name: English
en.prompt: Calculate {left} plus {right}. Answer with a complete English sentence.

es.name: Spanish
es.prompt: Calcula {left} mas {right}. Responde con una oracion completa en espanol.

fr.name: French
fr.prompt: Calcule {left} plus {right}. Reponds avec une phrase complete en francais.

ja.name: Japanese
ja.prompt: {left}と{right}を足してください。日本語の完全な文で答えてください。
